title: Inconsistent result when using hash partition and view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default', PRIMARY KEY(c1));
CREATE VIEW v2 AS SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'value1'), (2, NULL), (3, 'value3') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c2='updated';
SELECT * FROM v2 WHERE c2 LIKE 'value%';
CREATE TABLE t2(c3 FLOAT NOT NULL, c4 DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, PRIMARY KEY(c3)) PARTITION BY RANGE (YEAR(c4)) (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (2020), PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (2021));
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results from hash partitioned views
